description_long: This bungalow features a boxy, modernist design with clean lines and a flat roof, set on a patterned base that suggests an urban lot. The exterior is primarily composed of light-colored panels, with some sections appearing semi-translucent or glass-like, especially on the upper level. The structure is two stories tall, with a visible staircase and a small balcony or landing area on the upper floor. There are minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a functional and contemporary aesthetic. Windows are sparse and asymmetrically placed, contributing to the modern look. The overall form is compact, with protruding and recessed volumes creating visual interest.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, light-colored exterior panels, and a minimalist, boxy design. Features include asymmetrical windows and a small upper-level balcony.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large glass-like panels, and the staircase leading to the upper floor.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the protruding upper section, a red accent near the staircase, and the compact depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the extended lower section, minimal window openings, and the overall rectangular massing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the recessed lower section and the continuation of the flat roof and balcony area.
